title: Get Over You feat. TheSoloist
lyrics: It's no way I can stay under you If I want, know that you just won't do Maybe we could have been as it were But then we'd have found things ain't always Maybe we're looking down, the rest it is just a dream I'm trying to find out what, how life has been When we come back to you, back to you I keep on going back to you I need to get over you Like a library book way overdue Like no sense left, can't leave this on the new I want to get over you I want to get over you Need to get over you You got me feeling blue And then I'm feeling red You make me so mad And then I'll treat you bad If I fight back to me And they think you're doing the same shit to me Keep going back and forth Doing that shit to each other And we know it hurts If we can't be the lovers like we love each other What are we doing it for? It's time to go home and move on Find a new way, find a new way Maybe we can change our ways Because we can't get estranged from the words that we use We'll be where we belong Hitting each other, taking on, checking in, checking out And I'm high and I'm stressed I want to smooth this kick back and do something else Something to ease my mind Something to help me unwind Maybe then I'll be fine But tonight I feel like I'm going back to you And now I'm going back to you I need to get over you Like the library book way overdue Like the senseless killing that's all I knew Gotta get over you Somebody change the key I need to get over you If I can't be my own man Why would I stand for something that I can't even see? The reason is a mystery That mystery Gotta get over you That visual thinking got me thinking Nobody else can do I gotta get over you And I can't get over you And I'm playing no games Your head I gotta get over you Leave you behind if I want to save my mind I gotta get over you I gotta get under you I gotta get fucked up just to not think about you

lyricsSegments.text: It's no way I can stay under you If I want, know that you just won't do
Maybe we could have been as it were But then we'd have found things ain't always
Maybe we're looking down, the rest it is just a dream
I'm trying to find out what, how life has been When we come back to you, back to you
I keep on going back to you
I need to get over you Like a library book way overdue
Like no sense left, can't leave this on the new I want to get over you
I want to get over you
Need to get over you
You got me feeling blue
And then I'm feeling red You make me so mad
And then I'll treat you bad If I fight back to me
And they think you're doing the same shit to me
Keep going back and forth Doing that shit to each other
And we know it hurts
If we can't be the lovers like we love each other
What are we doing it for?
It's time to go home and move on Find a new way, find a new way
Maybe we can change our ways
Because we can't get estranged from the words that we use
We'll be where we belong
Hitting each other, taking on, checking in, checking out
And I'm high and I'm stressed I want to smooth this kick back and do something else
Something to ease my mind Something to help me unwind
Maybe then I'll be fine
But tonight I feel like I'm going back to you
And now I'm going back to you
I need to get over you
Like the library book way overdue
Like the senseless killing that's all I knew
Gotta get over you
Somebody change the key
I need to get over you
If I can't be my own man
Why would I stand for something that I can't even see?
The reason is a mystery
That mystery
Gotta get over you
That visual thinking got me thinking
Nobody else can do
I gotta get over you
And I can't get over you
And I'm playing no games
Your head
I gotta get over you
Leave you behind if I want to save my mind
I gotta get over you
I gotta get under you
I gotta get fucked up just to not think about you
